id: the girl who can speak English
naturalChunk: the girl who can speak English
avoidSaying: the girl who can speaks English
the girl who can speaking English
sentencePatterns: I know a girl who can ...
realLifeExamples: I know a girl who can speak English very well.
usageNotes: After can, use the base verb: can speak, not can speaks.
productionPrompts: 用 I know a girl who can ... 写一句英文，注意 can 后面用动词原形。
